description:
Match ID: ff384ca1-9ba2-4aaa-b5f3-fbbb84242a91


Not so blatant but deffo has walls

The Kali Clip
However when he goes to peek he never checks basement stairs goes straight to the upstairs
Hatch was already broken so there was no sound que yet he knows to preaim and hold it.

The IQ Clip
Every round if there is no one there he just rushes in yet for some reason this round he breaks the door and does not clear anything else just baits the shot from the kid playing stairs.
Once the kid playing stairs runs down he just goes inside no droning or watching for rotating players.

The Smoke Clip
Looks directly at ash through the floor/wall before adjusting his aim properly.
Also funny how he drops and takes out his smoke to repeek even though he has no idea if ash is top, mid or bottom stairs now.
This one is the most blatent clip i could find so far.

The Maverick Clip
Simple he watches vigil lay down and repeeks preaimed for that yet cannot see vigil and yet readjusts aim standing level and prefires.
